$description: Love Church design tokens — W3C Design Tokens format. Machine-readable foundation for color, typography, spacing, radii, and motion across web, email, social, and app surfaces. Source of truth: skills/design-system/references/. Update both files in sync.

color.$description: Brand color palette. Neutral core carries 90% of every layout. Loud accent pink reserved for emphasis. Sunday Slides expanded palette only for energy/category coding (kids, REV, multi-color event graphics).

ink.$description: Near-black. Primary type, rules, and ink elements on cream.

cream.$description: Primary cream. Default page background, type-on-dark fill.

paper.$description: Off-white paper. Slightly cooler/lighter than cream — alternate background, body-copy paper.

taupe.$description: Warm taupe. Bridge tone — TOC backgrounds, secondary panels, muted captions.

taupeDeep.$description: Deeper taupe variant — used in the Annual TOC. Use when taupe needs more weight.

pinkLoud.$description: The loud accent. Year/CTA pills, section opener fills, body lead paragraphs, stat-page backgrounds, hero stats. Reserved — never the default UI color.

pinkSoft.$description: Soft pink — IG story highlight covers, secondary tints. Use sparingly; pinkLoud is the dominant accent.

expanded.$description: The Sunday Slides expanded palette. Used for category coding (Worship/Sunday/Photos/Self-Fed/Messages) and multi-color event graphics (REV Rally). Not for default UI surfaces.

gold.$description: Gold accent — used in slide system.

bgDefault.$description: Default background for any LC surface.

bgEmphasis.$description: Section opener / stat-page / loud emphasis background.

fgInverse.$description: Type color on ink or pinkLoud.

fgEmphasis.$description: Lead paragraph / pull quote / stat-number color on cream.

typography.$description: Two typefaces only. Neue Haas Grotesk Display for display + body. Apple Garamond italic for the emotional accent word. No third typeface enters the system.

display.$value: Neue Haas Grotesk Display, Inter, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
display.$description: Primary typeface. Display headlines, body, captions.

accent.$value: Apple Garamond, Garamond, EB Garamond, serif
accent.$description: Italic accent word in headlines, pull quotes, emotional emphasis.

medium.$description: Inline body emphasis (the bolded phrase pattern in the Annual).

black.$description: Display headlines — the heroic all-caps treatment.

fontSize.$description: Editorial scale — heroic at the top, workable at the bottom. Optimized for surfaces up to 1080px wide and email columns down to 320px.

display1.$description: Cover headline — ANNUAL REPORT, ENCOUNTERS section opener.

title.$description: Sub-section, IG quote-card line, email hero.

micro.$description: Stat block labels, page numbers, badges.

tracking.$description: Letterspacing in -1000 units (em × -1000). Negative for tight display caps; small positive for tracked-out small caps.

displayDefault.$description: Display2 / headline caps. The Core Style spec.

captionTracked.$description: Section labels in caps — tracked out for editorial spacing.

spacing.$description: 4-base spacing scale. Use the named token, not the raw value.

radius.$description: Border radii. The pill is the dominant component shape.

pill.$description: Pill badges — year pill, CTA pills, the LC mark badge.

rule.$description: Horizontal rule weights. Editorial layouts use rules instead of boxes.

ambient.$description: Slow drifts on hero motion graphics.

surface.$description: Canonical pixel dimensions per output surface. Use these exactly — never approximate.

heroDesktop.$description: lovechurch.org hero — designed at 2x for retina.
